description: Detects console.log/warn/error/debug/info/trace calls in JavaScript that should be removed or replaced with a proper logger. Simplified from Rust: flags all member_expression nodes for `console` object without filtering by method name (log, warn, error, etc.), test file suppression, or catch-block suppression for console.error.

flag.message: console method call detected -- verify this is not debug logging that should be removed or replaced with a proper logger
